ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – Order #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hello John,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been successfully placed and is now being processed.

• Order Number: 123-4567890-1234567
• Purchase Date: 15 April 2026
• Shipping Address: 12 Oak Lane, Springfield, IL 62704

Items in Your Order:
1. “Echo Dot (4th Gen)” – Qty: 1 – $49.99
2. “Kindle Paperwhite” – Qty: 1 – $129.99

Total Paid: $179.98

You’ll receive a shipping confirmation once your items are dispatched. If you need to modify your order, please visit your account within the next 14 days.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Needed for CEO
spam.body:
Dear Finance Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I need your immediate assistance with an urgent matter. Our CEO, Ms. Elizabeth Carter, has been approached by a trusted supplier who requires a $500 gift card to finalize a critical partnership. Unfortunately, the supplier’s request is time‑sensitive and must be fulfilled within the next 24 hours.

Please generate the gift card and send the confirmation to me at your earliest convenience. The card code will be used in a transaction that is vital to our upcoming quarter’s revenue targets.

To complete the purchase, click the link below: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,

Michael Thompson
Director of Corporate Affairs
XYZ Corporation
